ham.subject: Your Flipkart Order #1234567890 Confirmation – Thank you for shopping!
ham.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart! Your order #1234567890 has been successfully placed and is now in the processing stage.

Order Summary:
• Item: Redmi Note 12 Pro – 128GB
• Quantity: 1
• Price: ₹18,999
• Delivery: 4-6 working days

Payment Method: Credit Card (Last 4 digits: 1234)

If you need any assistance or wish to track your shipment, simply open the Flipkart app or visit <URL>.

Thanks for choosing Flipkart. We appreciate your business!

Best Regards,
Flipkart Customer Care

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected that your Microsoft 365 account password is set to expire in 48 hours. To prevent any disruption to your work and secure your personal data, please verify and update your password immediately.

1️⃣ Log in to your account using the official Microsoft portal.
2️⃣ Click the link below to reset your password. Note: This link is secure and will expire in 30 minutes.

<URL>

If you do not complete the password reset within the next 48 hours, your account will be temporarily locked, and you may lose access to critical services.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
Microsoft Security Team
